title: cascading-survivability
description: Hostile environment: rate_limit / outage / tool_failure / corrupted all firing at high rates. Many pipelines will abort. The hypothesis is NOT about completion rate — it's about state integrity. Every abort must save state cleanly, zero crashes, zero corrupted state files.

steady_state_hypothesis.title: Aborts are graceful: 100% state integrity, zero crashes, even under heavy cascading failures
